news.headline: Aussie regulator alarmed by Trump's move to ease crypto oversight, warns of risks to consumers due to increased regulations.
news.summary: The Chair of the Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC), Gina Cass-Gottlieb, expressed concern over the United States' decision to ease regulations on cryptocurrencies. Cass-Gottlieb highlighted that this move could heighten risks for consumers in the market.

news.headline: Global tall oil pitch market projected to reach US$278.1 million by 2035 with 3.7% CAGR growth, valued at US$187.2 million in 2024. Rising demand for eco-friendly materials drives market surge.
news.summary: The global tall oil pitch (TOP) market is projected to reach a valuation of US$187.2 million in 2024, with an estimated growth rate of 3.7% from 2025 to 2035. This market growth is driven by the increasing demand for sustainable and eco-friendly materials, particularly in industries focusing on green alternatives. Tall oil pitch, a renewable by-product of wood pulping, is gaining popularity in various applications such as adhesives, coatings, and surfactants in sectors like construction, automobiles, and personal care. The unique properties of tall oil pitch enhance product performance without increasing the carbon footprint, making it an attractive choice for industries looking for sustainable solutions. The market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 7%, reaching US$278.1 million by 2035 and creating an absolute opportunity of US$84.7 million. These trends indicate a shift towards bio-based products and the increasing importance of utilizing renewable resources in various industries.

news.headline: Virtual influencer market set to hit USD 111.78 billion by 2033, with CAGR of 38.4%. Social media growth drives market expansion.
news.summary: The article discusses the rise of virtual influencers, computer-generated characters used to represent brands on social media and digital platforms. These CGI influencers are created to appear like real individuals, engaging with audiences and promoting products. The market is growing due to the surge in social media and digital marketing, with platforms like Instagram and TikTok providing spaces for virtual influencers to connect with followers. As of October 2024, there were 5.22 billion social media users globally, with 63.8% of the population using these platforms. The integration of virtual influencers with gaming and esports platforms is also creating new opportunities in the market.

news.headline: BridgeBio Pharma's Attruby achieved over 1,000 patient prescriptions, with $75M milestone payment from EU approval. Over $680M cash reserves by Q4 2024, expecting $105M more in 2025. Multiple global study enrollments progressing, key programs advancing. Financials show significant revenue increase but higher operating costs, resulting in a net loss.
news.summary: As of February 17, 2025, 1,028 unique patient prescriptions for Attruby™ have been written by 516 unique prescribers since FDA approval. Acoramidis, the first near-complete TTR stabilizer approved by the FDA on November 22, 2024, achieved significant milestones. It was also approved in the EU as BEYONTTRA™ on February 10, 2025, resulting in a $75 million payment with ongoing royalties. Acoramidis has shown positive results in reducing cardiovascular-related issues in patients with ATTR-CM. The company also announced financial results, with $681 million in cash as of Q4 2024 and expected regulatory milestone payments. The company has enrolled in global registrational studies and shown significant progress in its pipeline programs. The financial report shows revenue growth and net loss trends for the company.

news.headline: Camping World buys Lazydays in Surprise, AZ. Expects to close more locations soon. CEO Lemonis anticipates multiple closures.
news.summary: Camping World Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWH), the leading recreational vehicle dealer globally, has completed the acquisition of Lazydays in Surprise, Arizona, including assets and real estate. The company, headed by Chairman and CEO Marcus Lemonis, plans to finalize the purchase of more locations in the following weeks. Lemonis stated that this is the initial step in closing multiple locations in the near future. This acquisition marks a significant move for Camping World as it continues to expand its presence in the recreational vehicle market.

news.headline: Cheniere Partners announces Q4 and full year 2024 results, and introduces 2025 distribution guidance in Houston.
news.summary: Cheniere Partners, based in Houston, has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company also announced its distribution guidance for the full year of 2025. Key figures from the report include revenue, profit, and distribution estimates. The details indicate a positive outlook for the company's performance in the upcoming year.

news.headline: Cheniere's report includes Q4 and full year 2024 results, while introducing 2025 financial guidance.
news.summary: Houston-based energy company Cheniere recently released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company also shared its financial guidance for the full year of 2025. In 2024, Cheniere reported [specific number] in revenue, showcasing its strong performance. Looking ahead to 2025, the company aims to [specific plan] to continue its growth trajectory. With a focus on the energy sector, Cheniere is poised for further success in the coming year.

news.headline: Alight (NYSE: ALIT) reported Q4 & full year 2024 results, with recurring revenue growth & strong cash flow. CEO optimistic for year ahead.
news.summary: Alight, Inc. (NYSE: ALIT), a prominent cloud-based human capital and technology services company, announced its financial results for the quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024, based in Chicago. CEO Dave Guilmette expressed satisfaction with the fourth-quarter performance, meeting projections and achieving revenue growth and robust cash flow. The company is poised at the onset of 2025 as a top player in the market, providing simplified tech services.

The company, listed on the NYSE as DNB, specializes in supplying business decision-making data and analytics globally. The report includes a comparison of U.S. GAAP and non-GAAP financial figures, with detailed tables in the press release. The specifics of these measures are outlined for clarity and transparency.

news.headline: Real Brokerage Inc. releases January 2025 Agent Survey showing growing market momentum, with high Agent Optimism Index in December 2024.
news.summary: The Real Brokerage Inc. (NASDAQ: REAX), a tech platform changing real estate, shared findings from its January 2025 Agent Survey. The survey showed a rise in market momentum at the start of 2025, following a peak in Agent Optimism Index in December 2024. “The housing market is displaying more consistent signs of activity after almost three years,” mentioned Tamir Poleg, Chairman and CEO. The survey signals optimism among agents and stakeholders for a positive trend.

news.headline: Global Crossing Airlines' Q4 2024 and full year financial results call set for March 6, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Stocks: JET, JET.B, JETMF.
news.summary: Miami, on Feb. 20, 2025 - Global Crossing Airlines Group, Inc. (Cboe CA: JET, Cboe CA: JET.B, OTCQB: JETMF), operating as GlobalX, the US's rapidly expanding charter airline, is set to conduct a conference call on Thursday, March 6, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. This call aims to review the financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year closing on December 31, 2024. The Company will release its financial outcomes in a press release before the scheduled call.

news.headline: MiNK Therapeutics regains Nasdaq compliance (INKT), meets all requirements, closes matter.
news.summary: MiNK Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: INKT), a biopharmaceutical company in New York, has recently announced their compliance with Nasdaq requirements as of Feb. 20, 2025. The company focuses on developing allogeneic iNKT cell therapies for cancer and other immune-mediated diseases. Nasdaq confirmed MiNK’s compliance with the minimum bid price and market value of listed securities needed for continued listing on The Nasdaq Capital Market. This development ensures that MiNK meets all Nasdaq Capital Market listing requirements, resolving the issue effectively.

news.headline: Southern Company reports Q4 2024 earnings of $534 million (49 cents/share), down from $855 million (78 cents/share) in Q4 2023.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Southern Company announced its fourth-quarter earnings for 2024, revealing a decrease from $855 million, or 78 cents per share, in the fourth quarter of 2023 to $534 million, or 49 cents per share. The full-year 2024 earnings were also disclosed, indicating further details on the financial performance for that period.

news.headline: Laureate Education (NASDAQ: LAUR) reports Q4 & full-year 2024 results, operates 5 institutions in Mexico & Peru.

news.headline: Tango Therapeutics to present at 3 investment bank conferences in NY and FL, aiming to deliver precision cancer medicines.

The B Riley Precision Oncology & Radiopharma Conference is set for late February in New York, NY, while the Leerink Global Healthcare Conference and Barclays 27th Annual Global Healthcare Conference are scheduled for March in Miami, FL. Tango Therapeutics' management is set to be involved in these events to showcase their advancements in the field.

news.headline: Immunic's oral IMU-856 shows promise for weight management in celiac disease patients by increasing GLP-1 levels. Phase 2 ready.
news.summary: Recent data indicates that IMU-856 may serve as an innovative oral treatment for weight management, with the program being prepared for Phase 2 trials. A post hoc analysis of patients from the Phase 1b clinical trial in Celiac Disease revealed a notable increase in endogenous GLP-1 levels based on the dosage administered. This suggests promising potential for leveraging IMU-856 as an effective treatment option for weight management, highlighting its dose-dependent effects.

news.headline: BT Group partners with Optiva to expand enterprise services, providing advanced flexibility and capabilities to business customers.
news.summary: Optiva is enhancing BT Group's abilities to enhance high-tech enterprise services, providing business clients with unparalleled flexibility and capabilities.

Nova is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol NVMI.

Investors and stakeholders can tune in on that day to get insights into the company's financial performance, strategies, and future outlook. This event is crucial for understanding the company's progress and is expected to provide valuable information to participants. news.headline: Welsh, Carson, Anderson & Stowe (WCAS) adds 2 new Operating Partners: Dennis Dresser and Anne Maloney, specializing in tech & healthcare.

The presentation is scheduled for February 27, 2025, at 8:00 am Eastern Time through a conference call. Intellia Therapeutics focuses on pioneering CRISPR-based therapies to innovate medicine.

news.headline: V2X Inc. awarded $21M contract to sustain avionics for U.S. Air Force, including repair and maintenance of AN/ALQ-172 systems.
news.summary: V2X Inc., based in Reston, Virginia, announced on February 20, 2025, that they have secured a significant contract from the U.S. Air Force. The $21 million firm-fixed-price contract is aimed at providing support for vital avionics and electronic warfare systems. Specifically, the contract will involve the upkeep and repair of AN/ALQ-172 systems. This development signifies V2X Inc.'s continued involvement in enhancing the capabilities of the U.S. Air Force and maintaining essential defense infrastructure.

news.headline: Trinity Capital Inc. invests $15M in Cagent Vascular Inc., a developer of technology for vessel dilation.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Trinity Capital Inc. (NASDAQ: TRIN) disclosed its decision to invest $15 million in growth capital into Cagent Vascular Inc., a prominent company specializing in serration technology for vessel dilation. Trinity Capital, a well-known alternative asset manager, made this significant commitment to assist in the further development of Cagent Vascular Inc.'s innovative solutions in the medical field.

news.headline: NowVertical settles CAD$3.025 million debt through 9,168,418 shares at $0.33/share, converting debt to equity.
news.summary: A press release from NowVertical Group Inc. (TSXV: NOW) reported that the company recently resolved CAD$3.025 million in past obligations by issuing 9,168,418 Class A subordinate voting shares at $0.33 per share. This action was taken to address specific historical company debts.

news.headline: The Shyft Group reports strong Q4 and full-year 2024 results with $870-970 million sales outlook for 2025, up 17% y-o-y.
news.summary: The Fleet Vehicles and Services (FVS) reported a significant increase in margins, primarily due to operational enhancements. Strong margins were also seen in Specialty Vehicles (SV). The successful shipment of Blue Arc™ Class 4 EV trucks to FedEx was highlighted. The company has provided a full-year sales forecast for 2025, projecting revenues in the range of $870 to $970 million, which represents a 17% increase from the previous year.

news.headline: Mandalay Resources reports 2M gold equivalent ounces in mineral reserves and resources for Costerfield and Björkdal mines in 2024.

Repligen (NASDAQ:RGEN) reports Q4 2024 results on Feb 20, 2025; provides FY 2025 financial guidance.

news.headline: Western Upper Peninsula communities show unanimous support for Copperwood Mine Project as Ironwood, Wakefield, Erwin Townships, Gogebic County Board of Commissioners, and Road Commission approve resolutions.
news.summary: Ironwood Township, Wakefield Township, and Erwin Township, along with the Gogebic County Board of Commissioners and Gogebic County Road Commission, have all unanimously approved new resolutions of support. This decision was made with full agreement from all parties involved.

The board of directors of Labrador Gold Corp. has given the green light to these initiatives. The company's stocks are traded as TSX.V:LAB, OTCQX:NKOSF, and FNR: 2N6.

news.summary: In 2024, the company made remarkable strides in its commercial endeavors, culminating in a total revenue of $333.6 million. Out of this, an impressive $319.2 million was attributed to U.S. net product sales.

news.headline: Electra finds gold-rich cobalt-copper mineralization at CAS Property in Idaho, strengthening exploration strategy. Important for company's growth.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Electra Battery Materials Corporation shared an update on its exploration activities at the CAS Property in the Idaho Cobalt Belt, United States. The company, listed on NASDAQ as ELBM and TSX-V as ELBM, revealed promising findings. The data collected, both recent and historical, showcased noteworthy gold concentrations over substantial periods, emphasizing the CAS Property's increasing significance within Electra's exploration plans in Idaho. This development underscores the potential for significant future growth and success in the region.

news.headline: N. Joy Falotico joins Lincoln Electric's Board of Directors, expanding it to 12 members with 11 independents.
news.summary: Cleveland-based Lincoln Electric Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: LECO) has appointed N. Joy Falotico, previous President of The Lincoln Motor Company under Ford Motor Company (NYSE: F), to its Board of Directors on February 19, 2025. Falotico will join the Audit and Nominating and Corporate Governance Committees. With this addition, the board now consists of 12 directors, with 11 being independent.

news.headline: Leonardo DRS (Nasdaq: DRS) reported record bookings, mid-teens organic revenue growth, and healthy adjusted EBITDA margin expansion in Q4 and full year 2024.
news.summary: Arlington-based company Leonardo DRS, Inc. (Nasdaq: DRS), a prominent defense technology provider, disclosed their financial performance for Q4 and full-year 2024. The CEO expressed satisfaction with the results, highlighting achievements such as record bookings, mid-teens organic revenue growth, increased adjusted EBITDA margin, and strong free cash flow. The company's focus on customer satisfaction and solving their needs contributed to these successes.

news.headline: Altisource closes exchange transaction for term loans with 100% lenders, secures $12.5M super senior credit facility.
news.summary: Altisource Portfolio Solutions S.A. announced on February 20, 2025, the successful completion of an exchange transaction with all lenders under its senior secured term loans, totaling a transaction with a value of $12.5 million through a super senior credit facility. Altisource is a leading provider and marketplace in the real estate and mortgage industries. This transaction, referred to as the Term Loan Exchange Transactions, involved all 100% of the lenders associated with the Company.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: The US is ready for a ramp-up or wind-down of Russia sanctions
Dow Jones futures drop as Walmart tumbles on earnings, while Alibaba jumps. Palantir, Axon, and Cava also saw declines.
news.summary: Stock futures experienced a decline, with Walmart seeing a significant drop in early trading due to disappointing earnings, while Alibaba surged. On Wednesday, companies like Palantir, Axon, and Cava also faced a decrease in their stock prices. The Dow Jones futures fell as Walmart tumbled, but on the positive side, Alibaba's stock made a big jump following the declines of Palantir, Axon, and Cava.

news.headline: President Trump ends U.S. penny production in a historic move due to high minting costs exceeding coin value after 233 years.
news.summary: In a landmark move, President Donald Trump from the United States has made the decision to cease the production of pennies after a long-standing 233-year history. This decision comes as a result of economic considerations as the expenses related to minting surpass the actual value of the coin. This change has significant implications not only on the country's monetary system but also on its history and heritage.

news.headline: PAN Global is progressing with a multi-target drill program in Southern Spain. 6 drillholes completed, new targets found, assays awaited. Drilling to start in two weeks. TSXV: PGZ | OTCQX: PGZFF | FRA: 2EU.
news.summary: PGZ, listed on TSXV and OTCQX as PGZFF and FRA as 2EU, has finished an IP survey at Bravo target. Drilling is set to begin in two weeks, with six drillholes already completed at Escacena. These holes include new targets and step-out holes at La Romana discovery. Assay results are pending. Numerous geophysical targets at Escacena are yet to be explored.

news.headline: Stocks to watch: Walmart, Dropbox; Expected earnings: Dropbox ($0.62/share, $638.91M revenue); Dropbox shares fell 1.8% to $32.67.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stock futures are down, drawing attention to specific stocks for investors. Dropbox, Inc. (NASDAQ:DBX) is expected to announce quarterly earnings of 62 cents per share with revenue hitting $638.91 million post-market close. On Wednesday, Dropbox shares saw a 1.8% decline, closing at $32.67. Analysts are also closely watching Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) for updates. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Alight, Inc. appoints Russ Fradin as Chairman of the Board, replacing William Foley on March 1, 2025. New directors added.
news.summary: Alight, Inc. (NYSE: ALIT), a prominent human capital and technology services provider, has named Russell (Russ) P. Fradin as the new Chairman of the Board of Directors, taking over from William P. Foley, II, who will remain a board member. These changes are set to be effective starting from March 1, 2025. The appointments of Robert (Rob) Schriesheim, Robert (Bob) Lopes, Jr., and Mike Hayes to the board have also been confirmed.

news.headline: France's Buy Now Pay Later market to reach $12.68 billion in 2025. Key players include Alma, Klarna, Scalapay, Clearpay, PayPal, LiftForward, and Younited Credit.
news.summary: A recent report on the Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) market in France has been released, offering insights on the business and investment opportunities within the sector. According to the report, the BNPL payment market in France is projected to see a significant growth, with an expected annual increase of 11.3%. By 2025, the market size is predicted to reach US$12.68 billion. Notably, France's BNPL market showed strong expansion from 2021 to 2024, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 19.2%. This data highlights the promising growth prospects within the BNPL industry in France, making it an attractive market for investors and businesses alike.

news.headline: Palantir stock drops after DoD budget cuts. AI strategy touted despite retreat from all-time highs.
news.summary: Following reaching record highs, Palantir stock saw a decline on February 19 due to anticipated Department of Defense budget reductions. Despite this, supporters highlight the software company's strong artificial intelligence approach. The question arises: Should investors consider buying Palantir stock amidst this focus on AI technology?

news.headline: Paralympics champ Rory Cooper is hailed as the "wizard of wheelchairs."
news.summary: After achieving success in the Paralympics, Rory Cooper has become known as the "wizard of wheelchairs". Cooper, a champion in Paralympic sports, has garnered attention for his innovative work in wheelchair technology. The article mentions his title as the "wizard of wheelchairs" and his previous achievements in sports.
